summary: Made two surgical seam edits to strengthen the night-to-morning entry from Chapter 16 and to aim the closing pressure more clearly toward the family’s next housing arrangement before Chapter 18.
edits: Reframed the opening sentence to mark the morning handoff more explicitly from the previous chapter's overnight shelter scene.
